implementationSummary: Phase 2.5-review-a (#256) VPS wiring slice: HITL runbook for DNS A records, Nginx vhost install, and Certbot auto-renew; executable provision-nginx.sh to copy split frontend/backend vhosts on the VPS; smoke-test.sh --dns-tls-only mode to validate DNS/TLS before #257/#258 deploy apps; app_review_deployment issues index; 11 CI contract tests. Live DNS/TLS on the VPS remains HITL for the operator.
assumptions: Chose #256 over #254 — #256 is the prerequisite infra slice; #254 is E2E verification after #257–#260
Executor domain backend per infra/deploy + Nginx/systemd envelope; no runtime code changes
#253 deploy config on main satisfies the blocked-by dependency for repo-side work
502 from Nginx during #256 validation is acceptable when upstreams are not yet deployed
risks: Issue cannot be fully closed until operator completes HITL DNS + Certbot steps on the VPS
Full smoke-test.sh (frontend/health/OAuth) still fails until #257/#258 deploy juli-web and juli-api
Certbot requires port 80 reachable during ACME HTTP-01 — firewall misconfiguration is a common HITL blocker
